author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Rename GPU check macros to uppercase

Rename:
  - `cudaCheck(...)` to `CUDA_CHECK(...)`
  - `nvmlCheck(...)` to `NVML_CHECK(...)`
  - `hipCheck(...)` to `HIP_CHECK(...)`
  - `rsmiCheck(...)` to `RSMI_CHECK(...)`

#### PR validation:

Unit tests ran successfully.
title: Rename GPU check macros to uppercase
